hero.label: SOFTWARE ARCHITECT & TECH LEAD
hero.headline: Software architect focused on results.
hero.subtitle: 5 years leading teams, architecting distributed systems, and delivering platforms serving 10,000+ daily users with 99.999% uptime.

about.label: ABOUT
about.headline: An engineer who leads by delivery, not by title.
about.text_col1:
Computer Engineer with 5 years of experience building and scaling SaaS platforms. I work as a software architect and tech lead, but I make a point of being the highest-delivering developer on my team.

My focus is measurable results: systems that scale, costs that decrease, teams that deliver with cadence. Always seeking new knowledge and exchanging experiences.
about.text_col2:
Responsible for the architecture of 60+ microservices, cloud infrastructure (GCP/AWS), and the entire delivery cycle — from system design to production deployment.

I build platforms that serve thousands of daily users with high availability, while reducing costs and accelerating team velocity.

education.label: Education
education.value: B.Sc. Computer Engineering, Univ. Santa Cecília

items.title: Fleet management system
items.description: Web platform with 10k+ daily visits for real-time tracking, vehicle management, drivers, maintenance and telemetry.

items.title: Field operations app
items.description: Cross-platform app (iOS/Android) for fleet managers and drivers with real-time tracking, remote vehicle control and operational checklists.

items.title: Microservices architecture
items.description: Ecosystem of 60+ microservices with event-driven architecture, message queues, PubSub and auto-scaling. Multi-layer disaster recovery.

items.title: Engineering metrics dashboard
items.description: SSR panel with developer performance metrics: velocity, complexity, cycle time and scoring — data integrated via Google Sheets API.
